title: Peacemaker
subTitle: Red's ceremony uncovers Eagly's whereabouts as Flag faces Peacemaker. Later, Peacemaker makes a pivotal decision while Adebayo and Vigilante attempt to bring together the 11th Street Kids.

title: Peacemaker
subTitle: Chris joins a secret team to fight weird bugs living inside people around the world, travelling to many places to stop the bugs from spreading.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda and Steve fall out of love over parenthood and live separately in the same flat. Meanwhile, at Aidan Shaw's design fair, Carrie encounters Mr and Mrs Big.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie feels guilty about her intimacy with Mr Big behind Aidan's back. Meanwhile, Charlotte's engagement bliss diminishes when Trey's family's prenuptial agreement appears.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Charlotte's wedding planning panic is easily solved when Samantha refers her to stylist Anthony Marantino. Meanwhile, paranoid Miranda worries about a man in a restaurant's sandwich costume.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda tries multi-dating but quickly finds nobody wants a lawyer. Meanwhile, Samantha forms an instant connection with Trey's cousin Caleb.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Ralph's callous behavior finally steps over the line and Chris gets deeper into his heroin addiction. Meanwhile, Uncle Junior's mental capacity begins to become in question.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: In the midst of suspicions that he took Ralph's life, Tony makes the decision to intervene in order to get Chris clean and sober.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Tony's dreams seem to tell him where his life is headed. However, he is unable to stop himself from feeling as though he's out of control.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Carmela and Furio grow close for safety. Meanwhile, Paulie unexpectedly discovers that he is not as big a fish as he thought he was.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Vince tries to help out a fellow addict but things end badly while Ari decides to rekindle an old relationship. Later, Turtle receives news from Carlos about his investment in Avion.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Ari continues his fling with former flame, Dana Gordon. However, after a bad session of couples therapy, Ari takes Dana out to Bobby Flay's restaurant to get back at his wife.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Cersei and Jaime adjust to a world without Tywin, while Tyrion and Varys arrive in Pentos. Later, a new enemy emerges in Meereen.

subTitle: Sherlock accepts a case from a man who claims to be Moriarty; Gregson tries to talk Joan into giving up her dangerous line of work and return to being a sober companion.

subTitle: Miranda believes she has been stood up until she learns her date died of a heart attack. Later, she agrees to go to the wake and meets a man who used to date Carrie.

subTitle: When the quartet is invited to an engagement party, Carrie and Miranda feel like outcasts. Meanwhile, Samantha interacts with a television agent, but soon switches her attention to a Franciscan.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie and Stanford meet Lynn Cameron, an old friend, who is producing a New York fashion show featuring real models. Subsequently, she insists Carrie model in the show for her.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Faded television starlet Valerie Cherish attempts to land a role in a new sitcom, Room and Bored, by taking part in a reality show chronicling her somewhat mortifying comeback.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: The cast flies to New York City to introduce the media to Aunt Sassy and her attractive charges. As that happens, the ever bubbly Valerie gets a reality check on just how far her star has fallen.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Sherlock must face his past when he travels to London to revisit an old case; Watson learns more about Sherlock's pre-New York life; Sherlock's brother, Mycroft, reveals some secrets.

subTitle: Daenerys apprehends the leaders of Meereen's great families, while Jon confronts a challenging decision. Later, Theon must face Sansa.
